tuning: E A D G B E
content:
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
              I’ll Stand By You (Live) – The Pretenders
---------------------------------------------------------------------------

Written by: Chrissie Hynde/Tom Kelly/Billy Steinberg
From: “Live in London” (2010)

Tabbed by: maguri
Tuning: Standard

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

[tab]CHORDS
           E-A-D-G-B-e
D/F#       2-x-0-2-3-x
F#m(add11) 2-4-4-2-0-x
G(add9)    3-x-0-2-0-3
Dsus2      x-x-0-2-3-0
Bm(add11)  x-2-4-4-3-0[/tab]

---------------------------------------------------------------------------
[Intro]
| [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch] | [ch]G[/ch] |

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Dsus2[/ch]          [ch]F#m(add11)[/ch]
Oh ... why look so sad[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G(add9)[/ch]
Tears are in your eyes[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Come on and come to me now[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]
Don't be ashamed to cry[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
Let me see you through[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
Cause I've seen the dark side too[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]
When the night falls on you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                [ch]Bm[/ch]
Don't know what to do[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
Nothing you confess[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Could make me love you less[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]D(sus2)[/ch]            [ch]Bm(add11)[/ch]
I'll stand by you, I'll stand by you[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Am7[/ch]
Won't let nobody hurt you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]       | [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] |
I'll stand by you[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
So ... if you're mad get mad[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F[/ch]
Don't hold it all inside[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C/G[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch]
Come on and talk to me  now[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
Hey ... what you got to hide[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
I get angry too[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
Well I'm alive like you[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]
When you're standing at the crossroads[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
Don't know which path to choose[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]
Let me come along[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Gsus4[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Cause even if you're wrong[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]D(sus2)[/ch]            [ch]Bm(add11)[/ch]
I'll stand by you, I'll stand by you[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Am7[/ch]
Won't let nobody hurt you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D(sus2)[/ch]
I'll stand by you[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Bm(add11)[/ch]
Baby, even to your darkest hour[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Am7[/ch]
And I'll never desert you,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]       [ [ch]D[/ch] ]
I'll stand by you.[/tab]

[Instrumental]
                        2/4
[tab]| [ch]D[/ch] | [ch]Bm[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] | [ch]Bm[/ch] | [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]Bm[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] |
(spoken)[/tab]
Even if you let me down
And I know you’re going to, cause you’re just a man
I’m gonna wait for you right here [?]
So don't be afraid ... [?] ... cause I’m not going wrong[?]


[Bridge]
[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]               [ch]Bm[/ch]
And when, when the night falls on you baby[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]
You're feeling all alone, you won't be on your own[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]D(sus2)[/ch]            [ch]Bm(add11)[/ch]
I'll stand by you, I'll stand by you[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Am7[/ch]
Won't let nobody hurt you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D(sus2)[/ch]
I'll stand by you[/tab]
                     Bm add11)
Take me in into your darkest hour
[tab]                 [ch]Am7[/ch]
And I'll never desert you,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D(sus2)[/ch]            [ch]Bm(add11)[/ch]
I'll stand by you, I'll stand by you[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Am7[/ch]
Won't let nobody hurt you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]       | [ch]D(sus2)[/ch] | [ch]Bm(add11)[/ch] | [ch]Am7[/ch] |
I'll stand by you     (I’ll stand by you)[/tab]

[tab]| [ch]Dsus2[/ch] | [ch]Bm(add11)[/ch] | [ch]Am7[/ch] |
        (I’ll stand by you)[/tab]
| [ch]Dsus2[/ch] | [ch]Bm(add11)[/ch] |
[tab]                   [ch]Am7[/ch]
I won't let nobody hurt you[/tab]

[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D(sus2)[/ch]
I'll stand by you, you’re not alone[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Bm(add11)[/ch]
Baby, even to your darkest hour[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Am7[/ch]
And I'll never desert you ...[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
I'll stand by you[/tab]
